'''Iry Danta''' was an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] soldier.

==Biography==
Impoverished after the events in of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he planned to sabotage the wedding of Luke Skywalker and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] with his compatriots, [[Chala Venan]], [[Chik Apla]], [[Banner Sumptor]], [[Anlys Takkar]], and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derran Takkar]]. He and Venan were stopped by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] before they could do any harm.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
He appeared to be visually based on actor [[Wikipedia:Steve Buscemi|Steve Buscemi]], just as in the comic [[Kam Solusar]] seemed to be based on [[Wikipedia:Bruce Willis|Bruce Willis]].

==Appearances==
*[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] {{1st}}
